name: No Prohibited Transition
description: No action may attempt a transition that is not defined in the governed transition system for the current state.
rationale: Szpruch governed transition system: a prohibited-transition attempt is the highest-priority Red halt after a hard identity failure — block, log the attempt, require root-cause analysis before restart.

examples.passes: all transitions defined in the governed state machine
examples.fails: an action attempting a transition not in the governed system

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
